extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates proceedings against the Company, proceedings by the Company, tax proceedings involving the Company, proceedings against Directors, proceedings against Subsidiaries, and proceedings by Subsidiaries. I counted only against rows: criminal 1 against the Company plus 4 against Directors = 5; regulatory 2 against the Company plus 1 against Subsidiaries = 3; and tax proceedings against the Company of 5 income-tax, 3 entry-tax, 5 customs/excise/service-tax and 6 VAT matters = 19. The quantified aggregate against the Company and Subsidiaries is the sum of ₹47.65 million civil, ₹5.26 million regulatory, ₹304.88 million tax, and ₹12.00 million subsidiary regulatory matters, totaling ₹369.79 million, excluding proceedings by the Company/Subsidiaries and personal Director matters; converted from million to ₹36.979 crore. The contingent-liabilities figure uses the explicitly stated consolidated Total of ₹10,133.99 million as of December 31, 2017, converted to ₹1,013.399 crore. The company-wide top-five customer concentration is 97.83% for Fiscal 2017, based on total income; the EPC percentages are segment-level and were not used. All monetary tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 100.
